description_en: Pattaya may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 23 halal restaurants and 4 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Pattaya, Thailand, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Pattaya: 58 halal restaurants listed, 4 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.3/5.
